data.metadata: {"description":"One of the first gigachads on Abstract and a prominent member of the Russian community. Highly experienced both in gaming and in the broader crypto space. A knowledgeable person and a real value add to the ecosystem"}

translation.translatedDescription: One of the first gigachads on Abstract and a prominent member of the Russian community. Highly experienced both in gaming and in the broader crypto space. A knowledgeable person and a real value add to the ecosystem

data.metadata:
{"description":"Where do I do I even begin with my guy Tut?

It all started when we were gearing up for the Abstract Mainnet launch, and Tut announced Pre-Sale for Abstractions. We had crossed paths prior to this, but never truly connected. It had all the workings of a classic love story: he was a puppet, I was a penguin.

Up to this point, I hadn't heard of any art projects coming to Abstract, so this immediately intrigued me. Typically I am more into Cute IP, but there was something about Tut and his Aura that made me gravitate to him. I leaned into that instinct, and I'm grateful that I did.

Tut has become someone I genuinely admire as a leader, not only on Abstract & MegaETH, but across Crypto as a whole. He continues to innovate and push boundaries in a way that inspires the people around him.

I identify as a Tut Groupie, now and forever!"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Where do I do I even begin with my guy Tut?

It all started when we were gearing up for the Abstract Mainnet launch, and Tut announced Pre-Sale for Abstractions. We had crossed paths prior to this, but never truly connected. It had all the workings of a classic love story: he was a puppet, I was a penguin.

Up to this point, I hadn't heard of any art projects coming to Abstract, so this immediately intrigued me. Typically I am more into Cute IP, but there was something about Tut and his Aura that made me gravitate to him. I leaned into that instinct, and I'm grateful that I did.

Tut has become someone I genuinely admire as a leader, not only on Abstract & MegaETH, but across Crypto as a whole. He continues to innovate and push boundaries in a way that inspires the people around him.

I identify as a Tut Groupie, now and forever!

Al is my guy, 100%. There are some people in this space that stand out in your community, and Al is one of them.

I am beyond grateful to know Al and have him be a massive part of my community. 

We need more ALs!

data.metadata: {"description":"Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!

data.metadata: {"description":"Très présent au sein du discord Abstract, également sur X, Marvin est une personne impliqué au sein d'Abstract. Il suit la majorité des actualités en rapport avec Abstract, utilises la majorité des dApps de l'ecosystème et participe à la vie de communauté. \n\nUn véritable Gigachad !"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Very present within the Abstract Discord, also on X, Marvin is a person involved within Abstract. He follows the majority of news related to Abstract, uses the majority of the ecosystem's dApps, and participates in community life.

A true Gigachad!

I first met AL through Abstract, and we’ve talked a bunch on X since then always vibing, always supporting each other in the Abstract community. AL is honestly one of the most dedicated Giga Chads I’ve met. His love for Abstract and Penguins is on another level.

He’s always dropping quality, positive content about Abstract and Pudgy Penguins on X. If you’re new to either community, AL is 100% someone you should follow and learn from.

Keep being a legend and spreading that good energy, AL.

data.metadata: {"description":"MIC and I first crossed paths on Abstract through a handful of shared projects, but it wasn’t until we connected more deeply in Moonbirds that I realized just how much he elevates a community. He shows up with positivity, insight, and a genuine desire to help the people around him grow. His involvement in the Solana ecosystem even inspired me to revisit trading platforms. MIC has given me confidence that the right tools can truly elevate my trading approach, rather than relying solely on raw ability. I’m grateful our paths keep crossing, and I’m excited to continue building alongside him."}

translation.translatedDescription: MIC and I first crossed paths on Abstract through a handful of shared projects, but it wasn’t until we connected more deeply in Moonbirds that I realized just how much he elevates a community. He shows up with positivity, insight, and a genuine desire to help the people around him grow. His involvement in the Solana ecosystem even inspired me to revisit trading platforms. MIC has given me confidence that the right tools can truly elevate my trading approach, rather than relying solely on raw ability. I’m grateful our paths keep crossing, and I’m excited to continue building alongside him.

data.metadata: {"description":"Met Cristian through Abstract and we've been talking ever since. He's great at his craft with a lot of proven experience, also  such a great friend. Grateful for him!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Met Cristian through Abstract and we've been talking ever since. He's great at his craft with a lot of proven experience, also  such a great friend. Grateful for him!

data.metadata: {"description":"Eleni has always been there for me in every step of the way this year. \n\nShe is an authentic person, she will support you through and through and she will be good at what she does!"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Eleni has always been there for me in every step of the way this year. 

She is an authentic person, she will support you through and through and she will be good at what she does!

data.metadata: {"description":"Met Leeland in abstract he is an awesome and caring giga chad, and attends stuff IRL too. People like Leeland are who drives Abstract forward."}

translation.translatedDescription: Met Leeland in abstract he is an awesome and caring giga chad, and attends stuff IRL too. People like Leeland are who drives Abstract forward.

data.metadata:
{"description":"Mon frère d’arme, Leeland, est un créateur incroyablement talentueux, toujours débordant d’idées et d’énergie.
Il m’a énormément inspiré dans mes propres créations, et j’ai pris un réel plaisir à collaborer avec lui sur le projet de mèmes pour le lancement du mainnet d’Abstract et de sa mascotte Abster.
Travailler à ses côtés, c’est bénéficier d’une vision créative unique, d’une grande rigueur, mais aussi d’une vraie bienveillance.
Toujours présent pour donner des conseils avisés, partager son expérience ou simplement prêter une oreille attentive, il incarne parfaitement l’esprit de collaboration et de passion qui fait la force de notre communauté."}

translation.translatedDescription:
My brother in arms, Leeland, is an incredibly talented creator, always overflowing with ideas and energy.
He has greatly inspired me in my own creations, and I have taken real pleasure in collaborating with him on the meme project for the launch of Abstract's mainnet and its mascot Abster.
Working alongside him means benefiting from a unique creative vision, great rigor, but also genuine kindness.
Always there to give sound advice, share his experience, or simply lend a listening ear, he perfectly embodies the spirit of collaboration and passion that makes our community so strong.

data.metadata: {"description":"Mic’s a Vietnam Gigachad. solid Abstract contributor, always active and dropping real alpha in the chats. humble, consistent, zero red flags, just pure builder energy. A trusted member who connects people, builds bridges, and pushes the ecosystem forward"}

  "description": "Where do I do I even begin with my guy Tut?

It all started when we were gearing up for the Abstract Mainnet launch, and Tut announced Pre-Sale for Abstractions. We had crossed paths prior to this, but never truly connected. It had all the workings of a classic love story: he was a puppet, I was a penguin.

Up to this point, I hadn't heard of any art projects coming to Abstract, so this immediately intrigued me. Typically I am more into Cute IP, but there was something about Tut and his Aura that made me gravitate to him. I leaned into that instinct, and I'm grateful that I did.

Tut has become someone I genuinely admire as a leader, not only on Abstract & MegaETH, but across Crypto as a whole. He continues to innovate and push boundaries in a way that inspires the people around him.

translation.translatedDescription:
Where do I do I even begin with my guy Tut?

It all started when we were gearing up for the Abstract Mainnet launch, and Tut announced Pre-Sale for Abstractions. We had crossed paths prior to this, but never truly connected. It had all the workings of a classic love story: he was a puppet, I was a penguin.

Up to this point, I hadn't heard of any art projects coming to Abstract, so this immediately intrigued me. Typically I am more into Cute IP, but there was something about Tut and his Aura that made me gravitate to him. I leaned into that instinct, and I'm grateful that I did.

Tut has become someone I genuinely admire as a leader, not only on Abstract & MegaETH, but across Crypto as a whole. He continues to innovate and push boundaries in a way that inspires the people around him.

I identify as a Tut Groupie, now and forever!

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "퍼지 펭귄 우크라이나를 이끄는 동시에 Abstract의 Giga Chad입니다. 적극적으로 커뮤니티를 이끌며 팟캐스트, 음악, 스페이스, 밈 등으로 양질의 정보를 알려주고 분위기를 띄웁니다.

그리고 이 친구 남자가 봐도 상당히 잘생겼어요.

제가 MAXIMUS의 콘텐츠 중 가장 기억나는 3가지가 있어요.

첫 번째

Pudgy Penguins와 BE@RBRICK의 콜라보레이션 장난감 언박싱 영상입니다. 처음부터 씰을 뜯고 개봉해서 실제 어느 정도 크기인지, 어떻게 생겼는지 자랑하는 콘텐츠였는데 이건 나도 가지고 싶다는 생각이 들었습니다.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2003798322793025617?)

두 번째

Abstract 1주년 기념으로 랩을 작사·작곡 후 직접 불렀는데 Abstract에 대해 진정성 있는 애정이 있구나 하는 생각이 들었어요. 재미있는 점은 Abstract의 메인넷을 출시했을 때도 랩을 직접 작사·작곡 후 불렀더라고요? 한번 들어 보는 것을 추천합니다.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2014684572437422121)

세 번째

이글루의 창립자 Luca Netz와의 팟캐스트인데 PENGU ETF 현황이 어떻게 흘러가고, 정부에 로비를 어떻게 하고 있는지, 지금 진행하고 있는 파트너십, NFT의 가치를 어떤 방식으로 키워 나가고 싶고, 2026년부터는 제품의 품질을 올리는 전략까지 상당히 많은 Alpha 정보를 들을 수 있어서 많이 좋은 시간이었습니다.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/1999164007647969755)

Giga Chad들을 유심히 지켜보면 상당히 각자의 분야에서 다양한 재주를 가지고 있는데 적재적소에 Abstract에 쓰이고 있는 것 같아서 생태계에 있는 저로서는 매우 기분이 좋았습니다.

MAXIMUS의 피드를 꼭 둘러보시길... 최근에는 유튜브도 개설 했습니다."
}

translation.translatedDescription:
He leads Pudgy Penguins Ukraine and is also Abstract's Giga Chad. He actively leads the community, providing quality information and boosting the atmosphere through podcasts, music, Spaces, memes, and more.

And this guy is quite handsome, even from a man's perspective.

Here are the three things I remember most from MAXIMUS's content:

First

A video of unboxing the Pudgy Penguins and BE@RBRICK collaboration toy. It was content that showed off the actual size and appearance by tearing the seal and opening it from the beginning, and it made me want to have it too.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2003798322793025617?)

Second

He wrote, composed, and sang a rap to commemorate Abstract's 1st anniversary, which made me think he had a genuine affection for Abstract. Interestingly, he also wrote, composed, and sang a rap when Abstract's mainnet was released? I recommend giving it a listen.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2014684572437422121)

Third

A podcast with Igloo's founder, Luca Netz, where I was able to hear a lot of Alpha information, such as how the PENGU ETF is progressing, how they are lobbying the government, the partnerships they are currently pursuing, how they want to increase the value of NFTs, and even the strategy to improve product quality from 2026. It was a very good time.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/1999164007647969755)

If you look closely at the Giga Chads, they have quite a variety of talents in their respective fields, and it seems like they are being used appropriately in Abstract, which makes me, as someone in the ecosystem, feel very good.

Be sure to check out MAXIMUS's feed... He recently opened a YouTube channel as well.

data.author: 0x8188E27a4E359f2aa7ed3f41495a8816f35917D9
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.comment: A True Giga Chad & Core Community Leader

translation.translatedContent: A True Giga Chad & Core Community Leader
translation.translatedDescription: One of the strongest members of the Abstract community, very friendly and super engaging. Flockinho has always been one of the strong voices in the Abstract community, well respected across many communities and in CT. We are both members of the Pudgy community, and only positive things are said about Flockinho. Super happy to have him and to move the narrative forward together. A true gem, an awesome friend, and a free spirit. Well known, well respected, and definitely a certified Giga Chad.

data.author: 0x8188E27a4E359f2aa7ed3f41495a8816f35917D9
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.comment: Fellow Pudgy Friend & Core of Abstract
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "Flockinho is genuinely one of the most respected people in the Abstract community. He has a voice people trust, and that doesn’t come easily, it comes from consistently showing up and caring. He’s positive, loyal, and clearly loves what he does every single day.

I’ve been around CT for a while now, and it’s obvious how much effort he puts into supporting others. He’s always helping, always engaging, and always making Abstract feel like a place where everyone belongs. That kind of dedication really stands out.

What he’s done for the Lil Pudgy community especially says a lot. He believes in it, and he proves that belief through his actions. The daily motivation, the energy, the way he keeps spirits high, it all matters more than people realize.

If you’re part of Abstract or Pudgy, Flockinho is someone you’ll want to follow and learn from. He’s the real deal.",
  "source": "Ethos Everywhere Wallet",
  "version": "1.0",
  "client": "web"
}

translation.translatedContent: Fellow Pudgy Friend & Core of Abstract
translation.translatedDescription:
Flockinho is genuinely one of the most respected people in the Abstract community. He has a voice people trust, and that doesn’t come easily, it comes from consistently showing up and caring. He’s positive, loyal, and clearly loves what he does every single day.

I’ve been around CT for a while now, and it’s obvious how much effort he puts into supporting others. He’s always helping, always engaging, and always making Abstract feel like a place where everyone belongs. That kind of dedication really stands out.

What he’s done for the Lil Pudgy community especially says a lot. He believes in it, and he proves that belief through his actions. The daily motivation, the energy, the way he keeps spirits high, it all matters more than people realize.

If you’re part of Abstract or Pudgy, Flockinho is someone you’ll want to follow and learn from. He’s the real deal.

data.author: 0x8188E27a4E359f2aa7ed3f41495a8816f35917D9
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.comment: A True Giga Chad & Core Community Leader

translation.translatedContent: A True Giga Chad & Core Community Leader
translation.translatedDescription: Flockinho is an absolute Giga Chad and one of the most inspiring leaders in the Abstract community. A trusted voice who radiates positivity, loyalty, and genuine passion every single day. As a respected OG in Web3, he consistently elevates the entire ecosystem with his thoughtful contributions, unwavering support, and heartfelt dedication, making Abstract feel like a truly special and welcoming home for everyone. His incredible energy and positive impact shine just as brightly in the Lil Pudgy community, where he shows true holder mentality. Staying consistent, spreading real love, and uplifting everyone even through the roughest market moments. He builds with the team, supports the vision, and brings daily positivity that keeps the spirit alive. If you're part of Abstract or the Pudgy world, Flockinho is someone you definitely want to follow and learn from. Massive respect!

translation.translatedDescription:
I had the pleasure of meeting Becca in Dubai this year for Token 2049. She was one of the kindest and nicest people to come up to me and involve me in the activities.

I was able to connect with her on a friendly level and realize what a hard-working woman she is. She is remarkable and has made so much impact in Web3, not only through her job at AP, but also in the wider Pudgy Penguin Ecosystem.

It's been a joy to watch her live her dreams, achieve her goals, and now being part of the team.

data.subject: 0x8FdA0Ae3F9D91e95f60A631eAE417615c6EAE130
data.metadata: {"description":"My Greek sister and wonderful friend. Lucky to have met Nancy through Abstract and watch her excel at everything she has put her mind to. She's doing such a good job on Spaces & streams and always has time to talk. Not only great content, but a truly lovely person too."}

translation.translatedDescription: My Greek sister and wonderful friend. Lucky to have met Nancy through Abstract and watch her excel at everything she has put her mind to. She's doing such a good job on Spaces & streams and always has time to talk. Not only great content, but a truly lovely person too.
